{{Quote|Perhaps the unconfirmed reports of rebel support in the Senate are even true. There is no hiding that Senators such as Mon Mothma, Harkon Dell and Leia Organa have voiced their displeasure with the Emperor's New Order.|Wilhuff Tarkin|<ref name="DSTC-1" />}} 
'''Harkon Dell''' was a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Dell was known to voice displeasure at [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], and was suspected by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] of being, along with [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], a source of support for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]].<ref name="DSTC-1" />
